title: Interface entered in promiscuous(sniffing) mode.
ai_analysis: The alert indicates that an interface on an OCS-Inventory system has entered promiscuous mode, which is commonly associated with network sniffing. This could be a sign of an attacker attempting to capture network traffic, but it may also be caused by legitimate network monitoring tools. Given the severity level of 8 and no similar alerts in the past 24 hours, this warrants investigation.
response_plan: Verify if promiscuous mode was enabled by a legitimate application or administrator.
Check the host for unauthorized processes or tools that may be capturing traffic.
Review network logs for any suspicious activity originating from the affected interface.
Isolate the host if malicious activity is confirmed.
